info.title: Emarsys API
info.description: SAP Emarsys Customer Engagement platform REST API v2. Provides marketing automation capabilities including contact management, email campaigns, segmentation, automation center, and analytics.

get.summary: Get start pages for a specific administrator

post.summary: Get last change timestamp for contacts

get.summary: List contacts in a contact list
Get contact IDs in a contact list

post.summary: Add contacts to a contact list

get.summary: Get contact count in a list
Get contact data for a list
Get tracked links for an email

post.summary: Delete tracked links from an email

get.summary: List automation programs using an email

post.summary: Run segment evaluation for a single contact
Run segment evaluation for multiple contacts

get.summary: Get field translations for a language

post.summary: Trigger an automation center program entrypoint

key_id.description: Key field ID used for lookup (e.g. 3 for email)

contacts.description: Array of contact field value maps

ContactInput.description: Contact fields use numeric field IDs as keys
